reviews.comment:
La comida decepciona, pero para estirar las piernas es un excelente lugar, tiene un muy lindo parque.

(Translated by Google)
The food is disappointing, but it's an excellent place to stretch your legs; it has a very nice park.

reviews.comment:
Le pongo dos estrellas gracias a la atención de los playeros por qué el mini mercado es un desastre , a la noche pedimos tres hamburguesas y nos dijo de mala manera , y bue si queres esperar media hora …. Con el mercado prácticamente vacío 🤦🏼‍♂️

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it two stars thanks to the staff's helpfulness, because the mini-market is a disaster. We ordered three hamburgers last night and they rudely told us, "Well, if you want to wait half an hour..." with the market practically empty 🤦🏼‍♂️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb05PRWpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy desorganizado para comprar haces pedido ,luego pagas ,luego vas a q te entreguen y cdo me voy a sentar con mi familia me dicen en voz alta! escuchando toda la gente q estaba ahí y me preguntan si yo ya había pagado por la comida . Tuve q ir y mostrarles el comprobante de pago una situación muy poco delicada . Sería bueno mejoren la organización para q no sucedan esas cosas.

(Translated by Google)
The ordering process is very disorganized. You place your order, then pay, then go to pick it up, and when I go to sit down with my family, they loudly ask me—in front of everyone there—if I had already paid for the food. I had to go and show them the receipt; it was a very awkward situation. They should improve their organization so that these things don't happen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXd09hZnFBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Todo muy bien, lástima que no te dejen ir con las tazas a las mesas de afuera, entonces los vasos de cartón salen mas caros.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, it's a shame they don't let you take your cups to the tables outside, so the paper cups are more expensive.
